title: Aura Engine Product Manifest
description: Single source of truth shared across all Aura Engine skills. Every skill reads and updates this manifest. DO NOT edit manually.

product_slug.description: URL-safe slug of the product. Used as the directory name under /workspace/.

product_url.description: Primary product URL provided by the member (optional).

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the manifest was first created.

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last manifest update.

budget_tier.description: Internal budget tier captured from the setup input (daily ad budget).

skills_completed.description: Ordered list of skill IDs already completed (e.g. '00-setup', '01-product-research', '06a-page-planning', '06b-page-sections', '06c-page-deploy').

skills_pending.description: Optional list of skills expected to run next.

voc_count.description: Number of unique, verbatim voice-of-customer phrases captured in skill 02.

breakeven_roas.description: Break-even ROAS given the current offer economics.
